text: Fire extinguishers visible and unobstructed
Emergency exit signs visible and unobstructed
Fire hose gauges intact and seals visible
First aid kit accessible and sealed
First aid signs indicating location visible
First aider available on shift
Aisles and workstations clear of obstacles
Waste areas covered and separated correctly
Combustible waste removed from workplace
Areas outside buildings clear of waste and combustible items
PPE available and in good condition (gloves, masks, safety glasses, footwear)
No exposed wiring from light or wall sockets visible
No broken plugs or adapters visible
No overloading of plug outlets
Chemical containers labelled and sealed
Spill kits in place and stocked
MSDS accessible near chemicals
Emergency exits clear and unobstructed
Safety signage visible and legible
No visible slip or trip hazards in walkways
Fire extinguisher pressure gauges checked
Fire extinguishers fixed at regulated height with correct signage
Fire extinguishers numbered and number reflected on signage
Emergency lighting tested — minimum 60 minute function confirmed
First aid kit contents checked and restocked if needed
First aid register up to date
Machinery guards in place and secure
Equipment free from visible wear and damage
Defective tools tagged or stored in designated area
Portable electrical equipment inspected and in good condition
Distribution board doors and plates in place
All switches on distribution board labelled
No open switch gaps on distribution board
Chemical storage full check — containers labelled, sealed, correctly stored
Dust control measures in place and effective
Hazardous waste stored separately and labelled
Incident register reviewed
PPE inspection completed — damaged items replaced
Employees aware of hazards and emergency procedures
Defective lights reported and replaced
Broken or damaged building areas reported
Washing facilities clean and functional
Full fire equipment service records checked and up to date
Emergency evacuation drill conducted and recorded
Emergency evacuation plan reviewed and up to date
Assembly point clearly marked and communicated to all staff
Fire alarm tested and confirmed in working condition
OHS legal appointments reviewed and certificates valid
SHE rep consultation meeting held and recorded
H&S committee meeting held (required every 3 months)
Legal register reviewed and up to date
Employee OHS training records reviewed
First aid certificate validity checked
Fire fighting certificate validity checked
Risk register reviewed and updated
Machinery and equipment risk assessments reviewed
Vehicle inspection records reviewed
Pressure vessel inspection records checked (compressor, gas cylinders)
Hand tools register up to date
Portable ladder inspection completed
Electrical cables inspected and tested
Noise and dust levels assessed
Equipment SWP displayed at all relevant workstations
Fire hazard signage displayed throughout facility
First aid posters displayed in visible locations
